creator: thj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Changing the active loader on a serial console hangs loader, a hard reset is required to boot.

Entering and leaving the menu works, and selecting bootfs works, but selecting the active BE hangs loader.

Loader works on vid console.

This happens both with any without multicons:

/boot/loader.conf:
#boot_multicons="YES"
#console="comconsole,vidconsole"
console="comconsole"
boot_serial="YES"
comconsole_speed="115200"

Install is from the 20220414 bf13db086b8-254817 snapshot, system is running main-n254874-5fbf11f7039
